title: 3 pc of Jar Openers, Multi-Purpose Reusable Rubber Gripper Jar Opener for Seniors With Weak Hands Gripper Rubber Jar, Ideal Gift for Seniors with Arthritis.
description:
About this item
Seniors-Friendly Design: These jar openers are specifically designed to assist seniors or individuals with weak hand strength. The rubber gripper provides a firm and non-slip grip, making it easier for them to open stubborn jar lids without straining their hands.
Multi-Purpose Use: These reusable rubber grippers are versatile and can be used for a variety of tasks. You can use them to open jars, bottles, or even remove stubborn bottle lids with ease. They are designed to fit most standard jar and bottle sizes, ensuring convenience and compatibility.
Excellent Grip and Durability: The jar openers are made of high-quality rubber that provides an excellent grip on smooth and slippery surfaces. The durable and flexible material allows for repeated use without losing its effectiveness, making these openers a long-lasting kitchen essential.
Easy to Use and Store: These openers are user-friendly and require minimal effort to operate. Simply place the gripper over the jar or bottle lid, apply slight pressure, and twist to open. After use, they can be easily stored in a kitchen drawer for convenient accessibility.
Practical Kitchen Aid: The 3-piece set of jar openers is a practical addition to any kitchen. They not only make it easier for seniors or individuals with weak hands to open jars and bottles but also provide a versatile tool for anyone facing stubborn lids. These openers promote independence in the kitchen and can save time and effort in daily tasks.
reviews_5s:
I can't say enough about these jar openers! I even sent some to a friend of mine in Virginia! Aside from being a senior citizen, I also have some health issues that make opening bottles and jars virtually impossible! And you don't have to be a senior citizen to use these! But these work for every bottle and jar I have tried it on! From little tiny essential oil bottles to large salsa jars, it hasn't failed me yet! And they aren't horribly expensive either! Order these asap! You will be so glad you did!Opening jars so easy! These Jar Grippers are so helpful to me. I use them all the time and they never fail.
I have very weak hand strength and these are so easy to use and no straining to opening jars. They have a non-slip grip, and I can rinse them clean or toss in the dishwasher. I occasionally will use two at once to hold the bottom of a jar or bottle as well as the top to twist off the covers since I sometimes do not trust my grip or if my hands are damp. Priced right, too!I'm not getting any younger and these help with removing the lids of jars.
Completely non-slip, simple silicone design.They make it so easy to open lids. The style of them makes it even easier.As a bartender, I really appreciate these little hand savers!! They are silicone and long lasting!These are effective, easy to use, give good mechanical advantage. They come in a set of three sizes. Unlike larger mechanical devices, these are very easily stored and more handy. Their rubber grip grabs on, making a turning motion easy. The mechanical advantage seems to come from not having to squeeze hard to maintain contact and traction such that the wrist and arm have a better mechanical advantage. The basic limitation is the size. Though, size wise, they can handle 90% of the bottles and jars I've had to open, it would be nice if they had once size larger.These work great at opening a bottle.of water or a jar of pickles..as an older person my grip is not strong these wrap around lid and give you a better grip to open jars or bottles.. you can keep one and give one away you get 3.. they should last for a long time made very well..
.You would think the cone shape would prevent you from opening anything but a bottle but on the contrary the average jar can be opened also. The cone shape grips better on bottles and jars so you can concentrate on twisting not griping.My mom had one of these. Now that I'm in my 70's my grip strength isn't what it used to be. I use them every day to open stubborn caps and lidsI wore my first one out (had it for years), so I was very happy to find this pack of three. Best gripper of all the ones I’ve used.
